title: EKS Project Knowledge Base
description: Engineering Knowledge System - machine-readable project blueprint and charter

project_metadata.name: Engineering Knowledge System (EKS)
project_metadata.description: Schema-driven document registry and knowledge graph system for engineering asset management
project_metadata.purpose: Ingest, extract, and cross-reference engineering documents to build a searchable knowledge graph
project_metadata.status: Phase 1 COMPLETE through T1.98/I089/I090 — 243/243 tests passing. T1.96: discovery-driven schema loading via common/library/loader/schema_discovery.py. T1.97: schema-defined system_parameters in eks_config.json and universal get_system_param()/normalize_system_parameters() in common/library/config (L15). T1.98: EKS global_paths adopted as universal canonical path pattern (L16); common/library/paths/resolver.py provides resolve_paths() normalizing EKS and DCC path shapes; workflow_files/tool_files added to EKS schema+config for DCC parity. I087, I088, I089, I090, I091 resolved. config/ and paths/ registered as architecture-aligned sub-packages. §3.17 System Parameters Pattern and §3.18 Path Resolution Pattern added to universal pipeline architecture. eks_base_schema v1.9.0, eks_setup_schema v1.7.0, eks_config v1.7.0.

key_modules: engine/core/ - Foundation: registry, revision, config, schema_loader, pipeline orchestration, context, base engine, telemetry, validator, factories, setup_validator
engine/parsers/ - Plug-in document parsers (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, DGN, DWG) with parser_router
engine/discovery/ - CLI entry points for scheduling engines
engine/health/ - CLI entry points for health scorer
ui/backend/ - HTTP API endpoints for independent engine execution (12 endpoints + log streaming)
ui/ - Interactive dashboard (phase1_ingestion.html, eks.css, eks.js, ui_help.json)
config/schemas/ - 3-layer schema pattern (base/setup/config) for 6 schema sets + 4 fragments + project rules
data_flows: File Scanner → Parser Router → Parser → Structure Detector → Health Scorer → Document Registry
Schema Loader validates base/setup/config chain with $ref resolution
ConfigRegistry provides SSOT access to global parameters
common.library.config normalizes system_parameters across EKS flat-object and DCC array-entry config shapes
integration_points: Main server (port 5000) proxies /api/* to Phase 1 backend (port 5001), serves static UI from eks/ui/

core_entities: Document - engineering document with metadata, revisions, structural elements
Asset - plant equipment/instrument with fragment-based schema
Ontology - ISO 15926-aligned class and relationship definitions
Discipline - engineering disciplines (PI, EL, IN, CI, etc.)
terminology: Fragment - reusable property group for asset schema composition
SSOT - Single Source of Truth for global parameters

key_schemas: config/schemas/eks_base_schema.json - Core pipeline definitions (v1.9.0, incl. DCC-aligned setup defs, system_parameters_def, workflow_file_entry_def, tool_file_entry_def)
config/schemas/eks_setup_schema.json - Core property declarations (v1.7.0, incl. top-level setup values, system_parameters, workflow_files, tool_files)
config/schemas/eks_config.json - Core config values (v1.7.0, incl. discovery_rules, system_parameters, workflow_files, tool_files)

workflows.name: Document Ingestion Pipeline
phases: Phase A: File discovery and placeholder registration
Phase B: Parse, detect structure, score health
Phase C: Manual review and locking

workflows.name: Schema Validation
workflows.description: Load and validate all schema files with $ref resolution

functions: SchemaLoader.load_all() - Load all schema files with cross-validation
ConfigRegistry.get() - SSOT access to global parameters
ConfigRegistry.get_system_param() - Runtime system parameter lookup from schema-driven config
common.library.config.get_system_param() - Universal system parameter lookup for EKS/DCC config shapes
common.library.paths.resolve_paths() - Universal path resolver normalizing EKS global_paths and DCC folder_creation/discovery_rules into canonical ResolvedPaths (L16)
ConfigRegistry.data_dir/output_dir/archive_dir/config_dir/log_dir/schema_dir/eks_root - Schema-driven path accessors via universal resolver (T1.98c/I089)
DocumentRegistry CRUD - Document metadata operations with revision tracking
RevisionManager - Revision history and latest-revision filtering
FileScanner - Directory walk, type validation, placeholder registration
ParserRouter - File type to parser class mapping
HealthScorer.score_document() - 6-dimension health scoring
StructureDetector - Cover page, sections, tables, images detection
SchemaToDDL - Auto-generate SQL DDL from JSON schema definitions
PipelineOrchestrator - 3-phase pipeline (scan→parse→review)
ManualReviewManager - Flagged doc review, correction, locking
Phase1Handler (phase1_server.py) - 12 API endpoints + log streaming, proxy server
eks/ui/phase1_ingestion.html - VS Code-style dashboard (5 themes, layout switch, help modal)
eks/ui/eks.js - Fetch API client, doc table, tree, pipeline polling, Chart.js radar, review form
eks/ui/ui_help.json - Help schema with glossary and keyboard shortcuts
ErrorManager - System/data error handling with fail-fast
MessageManager - Catalog lookup with template hydration
SetupValidator - Project folder/file/env/dependency/output-path validation (T1.78)
EKSPipelineContext - Centralized state management
BaseEngine - Abstract engine with validate→execute→validate flow
TelemetryHeartbeat - Document processing checkpoints
MultiStageValidator - Setup/schema/data/parser validation
ParserFactory - Dynamic parser instantiation by file type
HealthScorerFactory - Config-driven scoring dimensions
StructureDetectorFactory - Detector instantiation

data_flows.name: Document Metadata Flow
data_flows.source: Raw engineering documents (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, DGN, DWG)

data_quality_checks: Ontology class map references valid classes
Project folder/file/env validation against schema-driven rules

layers: L1: Project structure validation — required folders and files (T1.77 via ProjectSetupValidator)
L2: Environment probe — Python version, conda env, key packages (T1.78/G3)
L3: Output-path validation — writability check on output dirs (T1.78/G4)
L4: User-input readability — data_dir accessibility check (T1.78/G2)
L5: Dependency probe — per-package availability report (T1.78/G3)
error_codes: P1-SETUP-F001 (missing folder), P1-SETUP-F002 (missing file), P1-SETUP-F003 (missing eks.yml)
P1-SETUP-D001 (missing dependency), P1-SETUP-O001 (unwritable output path), P1-SETUP-E001 (Python mismatch)

known_issues: I015 - DGN parser stub (48 CAD files unparseable) - Phase 3
I016 - Revision folder hierarchy inconsistency - Phase 2
I019 - Two project codes (131101 vs 131242) - Phase 2
I020 - Datadrop column range (33-112) fragment coverage - Phase 3
I021 - 22-64% data incompleteness across datadrop sheets - Phase 3

revision_history.author: opencode
revision_history.summary: I089 + I090 resolved — global_paths adopted as universal canonical path pattern (L16). Added common/library/paths/resolver.py (resolve_paths, ResolvedPaths) normalizing EKS and DCC path shapes. Wired ConfigRegistry + phase1_server.py to the resolver. Added workflow_files/tool_files to EKS schema + config for DCC parity; setup_validator validates them. Universal architecture doc: L16 + §3.18 + §2.2/§2.3/§2.4/§4.1/§4.2/§9/§10. eks_base_schema v1.9.0, eks_setup_schema v1.7.0, eks_config v1.7.0. 243/243 tests pass.
